points.title: Gregory Lake
points.description: Beautiful artificial lake perfect for boating, cycling, and scenic walks with mountain reflections and recreational activities.

points.title: Tea Factory Tours
points.description: Experience world-famous Ceylon tea production with guided factory visits, tastings, and walks through historic plantation estates.

points.title: Colonial Architecture
points.description: Explore Victorian-era buildings including Grand Hotel, Hill Club, and the iconic red-striped Post Office showcasing British heritage.

points.title: Horton Plains National Park
points.description: Visit UNESCO World Heritage site featuring World's End cliff, Baker's Falls, and unique montane ecosystem with endemic species.

points.title: Victoria Park
points.description: Stroll through beautiful botanical gardens with diverse flora, rose gardens, and excellent birdwatching for endemic highland species.

points.title: Seetha Amman Temple
points.description: Discover historic Hindu temple with Ramayana connections and traditional architecture in scenic mountain valley setting.

points.title: Hakgala Botanical Garden
points.description: Explore Royal Botanic Gardens with montane flora, experimental crops, and spectacular views from 1,745m elevation.
